title: MetadataCompletionGoldSchema
description: Human-annotated gold labels for the three target fields: venue, per-author affiliations, and resource-link classification. One JSON object per arXiv paper.

title.description: Paper title (copied from original metadata, used for cross-checking).

venue_gold.description: Ground-truth publication venue as of the annotation date.

status.description: 'submitted' = submitted/under review only; 'published' = officially in proceedings/journal; 'accepted' = confirmed accepted but not yet in proceedings; 'preprint' = only on arXiv; 'unknown' = cannot determine.

name.description: Canonical venue name. Use DBLP short form when possible, e.g. 'ICCV 2024', 'ACL 2024 Findings', 'CVPR 2024 Workshops', 'IEEE TPAMI'. NULL only when status='unknown' or 'preprint'.

doi.description: Publisher DOI (NOT the arXiv DOI). Optional.

evidence_url.description: Where you verified the venue: DBLP entry, publisher page, official proceedings page, etc.

authors_gold.description: One entry per author, in the SAME ORDER as the original metadata. If the original author list is wrong (missing / merged / split), also fill 'authors_list_fix'.

affiliations.description: Author's affiliations as listed on the paper's first page (English canonical name, no department/lab, no address). Multi-affiliation kept in first-page order.

evidence.description: Primary source you used to confirm the affiliation.

authors_list_fix.description: Fill this ONLY when the original metadata's author list itself is wrong (missing / merged / duplicated). Otherwise leave null.

original.description: Labels for each URL that already exists in the original metadata's resource_links, in the SAME ORDER.

added.description: URLs mentioned in the paper (typically the PDF or LaTeX) that were MISSED by the regex extractor but should have been captured as official_* resources. Include an evidence quote.

difficulty.description: Subjective difficulty of this paper's annotation.
